fact: Sildar warned that Klarg the bugbear was not killed and remains a threat deeper in the cave.

subject: hiding setup
fact: The party exited the cave and sought a safe location to rest.
source_quote: The party exited the cave and sought a safe location to rest

subject: hiding location selection
fact: Nikhil Reddy initially suggested hiding near the cleared goblin area.
source_quote: Initially suggested hiding near the cleared goblin area

subject: hiding location selection
fact: Kostadis noted the presence of dead corpses made hiding near the cleared goblin area risky.
source_quote: Kostadis noted the presence of dead corpses made this risky

subject: hiding location selection
fact: Kostadis suggested moving further out.

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Zenvon gained enough experience points to advance from Level 1 to Level 2.
source_quote: Zenvon gained enough experience points to advance from Level 1 to Level 2

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis walked Nikhil Reddy through the level-up process on Roll20.
source_quote: Walked Nikhil Reddy through the level-up process on Roll20

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis introduced the RPGBot resource for future reference.
source_quote: introduced the RPGBot resource for future reference

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis noted that Weapon Mastery had not been selected at Level 1.
source_quote: Noted that Weapon Mastery had not been selected at Level 1

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis guided Nikhil Reddy to choose Scimitar and Short Sword for Weapon Mastery.
source_quote: guided Nikhil Reddy to choose Scimitar and Short Sword

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis explained the Nick weapon property.
source_quote: Explained the Nick weapon property

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: The Nick weapon property allows the second attack to be made without using the bonus action.
source_quote: allows the second attack to be made without using the bonus action

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis explained the Vex weapon property.
source_quote: Explained the Vex weapon property

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: The Vex weapon property grants advantage on the next attack against the same target if the first attack hits.
source_quote: if the first attack hits, the next attack against the same target has advantage

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Nikhil Reddy chose Short Sword as the second Weapon Mastery selection.
source_quote: Chose Short Sword as the second Weapon Mastery selection

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Nikhil Reddy preferred a dual-weapon melee playstyle.
source_quote: preferring a dual-weapon melee playstyle

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis confirmed Zenvon gains Cunning Action at Level 2.
source_quote: Confirmed Zenvon gains Cunning Action at Level 2

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Cunning Action allows Dash, Disengage, or Hide to be taken as a bonus action.
source_quote: Dash, Disengage, or Hide can now be taken as a bonus action

subject: Zenvon leveling
fact: Kostadis explained the action economy framework: Movement, Action, Bonus Action, and Reaction each turn.
source_quote: Explained the action economy framework: Movement, Action, Bonus Action, and Reaction each turn

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is now Level 2 with 15 hit points.
source_quote: Zenvon is now Level 2 with 15 hit points
